name: plan-forge
description: Plan Forge — Harden AI-driven development plans into drift-proof execution contracts. 7-step pipeline, 20 reviewer agents, 14 skills, 69 MCP tools (core + LiveGuard + Watcher + Crucible + Tempering + Bug Registry + Testbed + Forge-Master), 46+ CLI commands, live dashboard, quorum mode, audit drain loop, self-recursive intelligence (Forge + LiveGuard), OpenBrain memory integration, cost tracking. Supports 9 presets (dotnet, typescript, python, java, go, swift, rust, php, azure-iac).
author: srnichols
